name: Summer House: Martha's Vineyard
overview: Follow a group of friends as they vacation in the historical Oak Bluffs area of Martha’s Vineyard, one of the most picturesque destinations in New England. From yacht parties to electrifying romance, both fun and drama are on the docket for these young professionals and entrepreneurs during their island getaway.

trailers.title: Your First Look at Summer House: Martha's Vineyard! | SHMV Sneak Peak | Bravo
